word: H1309 - בְּשֹׂורָה - bᵉsôwrâh - bes-o-raw' - Reward for tidings

sections.paragraph:
Original: בּשׂרה בּשׂורה

Transliteration: beśôrâh beśôrâh

Phonetic: bes-o-raw'

BDB Definition:

  1. news, good news, tidings, reward for good news
    1. good tidings
    2. tidings, news
    3. reward for good tidings

Origin: from H1319

TWOT entry: 291b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
